title: Stech Email Tone Improver
description: Rewrite multiple emails to be warm, honest, and personal. Upload CSV (with optional column mapping) or provide JSON array.

csvFile.title: CSV File (optional)
csvFile.description: Upload a CSV file. If you use dynamic mapping, provide columnMapping and rejectionTemplate.

emails.title: Emails Array (optional)
emails.description: Alternative to CSV: provide an array of email objects.

prefill.originalEmail: Dear Sir, your application has been rejected.

originalEmail.title: Original Email
originalEmail.description: The email content you want to rewrite.

originalSubject.title: Original Subject (optional)
originalSubject.description: Original email subject line to be rewritten.

recipientName.title: Recipient Name (optional)
recipientName.description: Name of the recipient for personalization.

senderName.title: Sender Name (optional)
senderName.description: Name of the sender for personalization.

columnMapping.title: Column Mapping (for CSV)
columnMapping.description: Map placeholders to CSV column names. Example: { "name": "Full Name", "position": "Job Title" }

rejectionTemplate.title: Rejection Template (for CSV)
rejectionTemplate.description: Template with placeholders like {name}, {position}. Required if columnMapping is provided.

defaultTone.title: Default Tone
defaultTone.description: Fallback tone if not specified per email.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of emails to process simultaneously (1-20).

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Max wait time per email request.
